name: Nooby ~ noobsquad ~
description:
hello! if you are reading this, then guess what? I made this on tv!

if you have any problems, please tell me in the comments on this page.

if you like the bot, please leave a review, but if you have just no comment but a bad review, your review will be deleted.

thank you for clicking on this one specifically, and have a wonderful rest of your day / evening / morning / whatever!

(is bot took me forever, and it's my first one, so it's going to have problems. also, established relationship with guest and nooby. have fun!)
creator: Moxi_Pause
